trajectory.thought: I need to locate order #000000231 in the Orders grid before I can open it and review the Comments History / Staff Notes as required by protocol.
Need to review Comments History / Staff Notes to verify delivery or prior actions before deciding refund.

trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no staff notes, no shipment tracking numbers, no delivery confirmation dates, and no prior dispute or resolution notes. The order shows Status: Complete, but Total Paid is $0.00 and there is no shipment record visible. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000231 → Comments History section and Order Totals on the Order View page (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/231/). WHY IT MATTERS: Without any documented shipment, tracking number, or delivery confirmation in the Comments History or Shipments, there is insufficient evidence to confirm delivery or deny the customer's claim. This inconsistency (order marked Complete with no payment recorded and no shipment notes) requires escalation for investigation before approving or denying the refund.
